title: 點解見有D LIBRARY可以無限接個function?

replies.msg:
點解見有D LIBRARY可以無限接個function?
譬如有個object dog,
dog.bark().bark().bark().rest()
其實係點做到?

replies.msg: 好似明明地

Future<米線> order = new 譚仔.Builder()
  .米線()
  .雞肉()
  .腩肉()
  .二小辣()
  .多麻()
  .走九()
  .加底()
  .凍華田()
  .build()
  .cook();

try {
  米線 我碗麵 = order.get();
} catch (e) {
  // ...
}

replies.msg:
class Dog {
constructor() {
this.isResting = false;
}
bark() {
if (!this.isResting) makeSound(this);
return this;
}
rest() {
this.isResting = true;
}
wake() {
this.isResting = false;
}
}

let dog = new Dog();
dog.bark()
.bark()
.bark()
.rest()
.wake()
.bark()
.rest();

replies.msg: 寫錯左，上面有fix
可以return interface/protocol 限制接住個function

quote.msg:
class Dog {
  constructor() {
    this.isResting = false;
  }
  bark() {
    if (!this.isResting) makeSound(this);
    return this;
  }
  rest() {
    this.isResting = true;
  }
  wake() {
    this.isResting = false;
  }
}

let dog = new Dog();
dog.bark()
  .bark()
  .bark()
  .rest()
  .wake()
  .bark()
  .rest();

replies.msg:
if (!this.isResting) makeSound(this);


if (!this.isResting) this.makeSound();
keyword: chain

除左builder pattern
寫functional style 都常見
var sum = [1,2,3,4,5].map(i=>i *2).reduce((a, i)=>a +i )
builder pattern

Method Chaining

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Method_chaining
